title: test-pr-001.diff
content:
PR: test-pr-001.diff
Source: UPLOAD
Complexity: complex
Model: llama-3.3-70b-versatile
Files reviewed: N/A
Findings: 1 total (0 critical, 0 high, 1 medium, 0 low)

Issues found:
- [MEDIUM] Memory-grounded review generated in None

title: test-pr-001.diff
summary:
```json
{
  "summary_line": "Adds token refresh and user auth middleware",
  "total_findings": 7,
  "findings": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "severity": "critical",
      "title": "Hardcoded secret key",
      "file": "src/auth/session_manager.ts",
      "line": 5,
      "issue": "The secret key is hardcoded in the session manager. This is a security risk as it can be exposed to unauthorized parties. The secret key should be stored securely, such as in an environment variable.",
      "fix": "Replace the hardcoded secret key with an environment variable, e.g. `const SECRET_KEY = process.env.SECRET_KEY;`",
      "memory_match": null,
      "memory_pr": null
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "severity": "high",
      "title": "Insecure password hashing",
      "file": "src/services/user_service.py",
      "line": 10,
      "issue": "The user service uses MD5 to hash passwords, which is an insecure algorithm. A more secure algorithm like bcrypt or Argon2 should be used instead.",
      "fix": "Replace MD5 with a more secure password hashing algorithm, e.g. `import bcrypt; password_hash = bcrypt.hashpw(password.encode(), bcrypt.gensalt())`",
      "memory_match": null,
      "memory_pr": null
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "severity": "medium",
      "title": "SQL injection vulnerability",
      "file": "src/services/user_service.py",
      "line": 20,
      "issue": "The user service uses string formatting to construct SQL queries, which makes it vulnerable to SQL injection attacks. Parameterized queries should be used instead.",
      "fix": "Replace string formatting with parameterized queries, e.g. `query = 'SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = %s'; result = self.db.execute(query, (email,))`",
      "memory_match": null,
      "memory_pr": null
    },
    {
      "id": 4,
      "severity": "medium",
      "title": "Insecure token validation",
      "file": "src/auth/session_manager.ts",
      "line": 40,
      "issue": "The session manager uses a simple token validation mechanism that can be bypassed by an attacker. A more secure token validation mechanism should be used instead.",
      "fix": "Replace the simple token validation mechanism with a more secure one, e.g. using a library like jsonwebtoken",
      "memory_match": null,
      "memory_pr": null
    },
    {
      "id": 5,
      "severity": "low",
      "title": "Missing error handling",
      "file": "src/middleware/auth_guard.ts",
      "line": 20,
      "issue": "The auth guard middleware does not handle errors properly, which can lead to unexpected behavior. Error handling should be added to handle potential errors.",
      "fix": "Add error handling to the auth guard middleware, e.g. using try-catch blocks",
      "memory_match": null,
      "memory_pr": null
    },
    {
      "id": 6,
      "severity": "low",
      "title": "Insecure rate limiting",
      "file": "src/middleware/auth_guard.ts",
      "line": 50,
      "issue": "The rate limiting mechanism uses a simple counter that can be bypassed by an attacker. A more secure rate limiting mechanism should be used instead.",
      "fix": "Replace the simple rate limiting mechanism with a more secure one, e.g. using a library like express-rate-limit",
      "memory_match": null,
      "memory_pr": null
    },
    {
      "id": 7,
      "severity": "low",
      "title": "Missing input validation",
      "file": "src/api/routes/protected.py",
      "line": 20,
      "issue": "The protected routes do not validate user input properly, which can lead to security vulnerabilities. Input validation should be added to handle potential security risks.",
      "fix": "Add input validation to the protected routes, e.g. using a library like pydantic",
      "memory_match": null,
      "memory_pr": null
    }
  ],
  "model_used": "local-fallback",
  "cost_usd": 0.0
}
```

title: dashboard-count-test.diff
summary:
```json
{
  "summary_line": "Updates code review process to use Groq or OpenAI providers",
  "total_findings": 5,
  "findings": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "severity": "critical",
      "title": "Hardcoded API key",
      "file": "app/core/config.py",
      "line": null,
      "issue": "The API key is hardcoded in the configuration file. This is a security risk as it can be exposed to unauthorized parties. The API key should be stored securely, such as in an environment variable.",
      "fix": "Replace the hardcoded API key with an environment variable, e.g. `settings.groq_api_key = os.environ['GROQ_API_KEY']`",
      "memory_match": null,
      "memory_pr": null
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "severity": "high",
      "title": "Insecure HTTP client",
      "file": "app/services/http.py",
      "line": 10,
      "issue": "The HTTP client does not verify the SSL certificate of the server. This makes it vulnerable to man-in-the-middle attacks. The client should be configured to verify the SSL certificate.",
      "fix": "Configure the HTTP client to verify the SSL certificate, e.g. `async with async_client(verify=True) as client:`",
      "memory_match": null,
      "memory_pr": null
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "severity": "medium",
      "title": "Unconfigured provider",
      "file": "app/services/http.py",
      "line": 10,
      "issue": "The code does not handle the case where the Groq or OpenAI provider is not configured. This could lead to errors when trying to use the provider.",
      "fix": "Add a check to ensure the provider is configured before trying to use it. For example: `if settings.has_groq or settings.has_openai:`",
      "memory_match": "Unconfigured provider",
      "memory_pr": "groq-test.diff"
    },
    {
      "id": 4,
      "severity": "low",
      "title": "Potential timeout issue",
      "file": "app/services/http.py",
      "line": 20,
      "issue": "The code uses a timeout of 30 seconds when making requests to the Groq or OpenAI provider. This could potentially lead to timeouts if the provider takes longer to respond.",
      "fix": "Consider increasing the timeout or adding retry logic to handle cases where the provider takes longer to respond.",
      "memory_match": "Potential timeout issue",
      "memory_pr": "groq-test.diff"
    },
    {
      "id": 5,
      "severity": "low",
      "title": "Missing error handling",
      "file": "app/services/http.py",
      "line": 20,
      "issue": "The code does not handle errors properly, which can lead to unexpected behavior. Error handling should be added to handle potential errors.",
      "fix": "Add error handling to the code, e.g. using try-catch blocks",
      "memory_match": null,
      "memory_pr": null
    }
  ],
  "model_used": "local-fallback",
  "cost_usd": 0.0
}
```
